package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_fmt_sprintf_for_simple_concat: Layer: String handling. Flag fmt.Sprintf used for simple string concatenation on hot or repeated paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario595Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
